__NOINDEX__
{{CargoRelicResonance
|relics=Boy with a Pipe,The Companions of Jehu,Mysterious Relic,Mysterious Relic,Mysterious Relic,Utopia
|rank=orange
|amount=6
|category=self
|description=Per 30 Wormhole Refiners opened, Snail ATK +12; 1500/1500 Wormhole Refiners opened
}}
[[Category:Self]]
[[Category:ATK Boost]]
